name: Other observation — Bali, Bali
description:
Got it — you're confirming a note was received and asking me to share a location to complete a report.

I don't have a location to share (I'm an AI assistant, not a GPS device). But I can help you:

1. *If this is about your Bali properties* — I can delegate to Kai (real-estate-dev) to pull up property locations from your portfolio
2. *If this is for a specific report you're working on* — Tell me which location you need, or I can help you compile location data from your existing files
3. *If this is a test or template message* — Acknowledged, the format works

What report are we completing? And which location do you need?
